title: Thelypteris albociliata
taxonomy: Thelypteris albociliata belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is classified within the genus Thelypteris. This species is a type of fern and is native to Central and South America. It is a member of the order Polypodiales and is further classified as a species of vascular plant. The classification of Thelypteris albociliata is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Thelypteridaceae, genus Thelypteris, species T. albociliata. Its classification as a species of vascular plant is due to its ability to produce leaves and roots.

Its medicinal uses typically involve the leaves, which are said to have anti-inflammatory properties. Thelypteris albociliata is believed to be effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
